findings.description: RST cross-reference markup `:ref:`newClassFromPropertyList`` leaked into knowledge file content. The sentence "詳細は :ref:`newClassFromPropertyList` を参照すること。" contains raw RST syntax that will render as broken markup in a knowledge file context. Since s3 already covers the detailed content, this navigation sentence should either be omitted or rewritten as plain text.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "詳細は :ref:`newClassFromPropertyList` を参照すること。" — this is RST-specific cross-reference syntax not suitable for a markdown knowledge file.

findings.description: `NMMessageRequester` is a PascalCase protocol name referenced in the プロトコル実装確認 code example (`@protocol(NMMessageRequester)`), but it is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source s2 code example: `[NMCommonUtil protocol:@protocol(NMMessageRequester) isImplementedIn:sender];`
